title: Opinion: Opinion | Exit Denied? Why Iran Won't Make It This Easy For Trump To 'Pause' The War
summary_full: The escalation matrix has risen rapidly, and Iran may be in no mood to give Trump the early exit he seems to be seeking so desperately now.
